message:
fix: BOM stripping, output size guard, cliCommand max length, patch script warnings

1. extractJsonFromOutput: strip UTF-8 BOM (U+FEFF) before parsing.
   Some CLI tools on Windows emit BOM which makes JSON.parse fail.

2. cliGenerateObject: reject stdout > 10MB. Prevents memory exhaustion
   if a buggy CLI tool produces runaway output.

3. cliCommand schema: added .max(256) to prevent absurdly long values
   from reaching Bun.which() and Bun.spawn().

4. patch-standalone-deps.mjs: every patch step now validates its match
   succeeded and emits a clear warning if it didn't. Previously, a
   changed @xenova/transformers version would cause silent no-ops,
   leaving the standalone binary broken with no indication. Also warns
   if expected files don't exist (structure change or missing install).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
